rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (dsocek's suggestion to derive component/naming discovery from existing mapping data like _packed_modules_mapping rather than hardcoded lists) is echoed in spirit by X's comment about reading pipeline._dit_modules instead of maintaining a fourth hardcoded list, with concrete file/line grounding. X also raises a plausible, well-grounded follow-up (text-encoder LoRA silent no-op) with specific actionable suggestions. Y's review is purely a validation/approval report with zero critique or suggestions, so despite being accurate it contributes almost nothing actionable and misses the one real reviewer concern entirely.
